---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: false
---

## Positions

### Since September 2024
**Professor at École Normale Supérieure, Paris**

### September 2008 – August 2024
**Associate Professor (Maître de conférences), École Normale Supérieure, Paris**

### August 2007 – August 2008
**Postdoctoral Researcher — University of Oxford (UK)**  
European programme SKADS (Square Kilometer Array Design Studies) 
<BR>
Supervisor: S. Rawlings

### September 2004 – June 2007 and September 2009 – June 2010
**Oral examiner (CPGE, MPSI track)**  
Lycée Janson-de-Sailly, Paris

### September 2003 – July 2007
**Agrégé-préparateur (AGPR)**  
École Normale Supérieure, Paris

### September 2000 – June 2003
**Teaching assistant (Moniteur)**  
Université Paris VII Denis Diderot


## Research Training

### 2016 — Habilitation à diriger des recherches (HDR)
**Observatoire de Paris**

**Title:**  
*The dynamical and magnetized interstellar medium*
<BR>
[Manuscript](files/Education/HDR-Levrier.pdf)

**Committee:** H. Sol, R. Lallement, D. Rigopoulou, M. Houde, F. Boulanger, J. Devriendt, D. Falceta-Gonçalves, T. Troland

### 2000 – 2004 — PhD
**Université Paris VII Denis Diderot**

**Title:**
*Disorder and coherence in interstellar medium structures: statistical analysis, interferometric filtering, and radiative transfer*
<BR>
[Manuscript](files/Education/PhD-Levrier.pdf)

**Supervisors:** E. Falgarone (ENS Paris) & F. Viallefond (Observatoire de Paris)
